lines: FACT:LP-01-001 The release train freezes API schemas every Tuesday.
FACT:LP-01-002 The evaluator writes one JSON artifact per fixture.
FACT:LP-01-003 TraceGuard accepts only retained child evidence.
FACT:LP-01-004 The canonical branch for reporting is main.
FACT:LP-01-005 A deprecated scorer once reported a false quality win.
FACT:LP-01-006 The hidden appendix contains no production credentials.
